overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in traditional robes poling a wooden boat through a historic Middle Eastern harbor. The scene features white stone buildings, palm trees, large wooden cargo cranes, and docked vessels under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor waterfront with palm-lined stone buildings

agents.ego_description: poling a wooden boat steadily through calm harbor waters along the waterfront

entered.detail: multi-story white plastered buildings with small windows lining the waterfront
tall palm trees scattered along the dockside
weathered wooden piers and platforms along the water edge
tall wooden cargo crane with counterweight structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit harbor with the character poling a boat past white stone buildings and palm trees. The large wooden cargo crane looms in the distance on the right while the boat moves steadily forward through calm waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo loading dock with wooden cranes and moored vessels

events.description: passing alongside the large wooden cargo crane structure

agents.ego_description: navigating past the large wooden cranes and cargo loading docks

entered.detail: wooden dock structure covered with red fabric canopy and stacked cargo
large wooden cargo vessel moored at the dock
traditional wooden sailing vessel with tall mast docked on the right

segments.scene_description: The boat passes the massive wooden cargo crane, moving from right to left in the frame. The character poles past a cargo dock with red awnings and a large traditional sailboat comes into view on the right side of the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor channel with stone bridge and moored boats

events.description: approaching and passing under the stone bridge archway

agents.ego_description: poling through the narrower channel under the bridge and past docked sailboats

entered.detail: stone bridge structure spanning the harbor channel with archway opening
dense cluster of white buildings extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The boat approaches a stone bridge arching over the harbor channel. The character poles underneath the bridge as the city skyline becomes visible in the distance, navigating between moored boats in the narrower waterway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit harbor that transitions from an open waterfront into a narrow city channel. It begins with the character poling a boat past white stone buildings and palm trees, with a massive wooden cargo crane looming in the distance. As the boat moves forward, it passes directly beneath the crane and glides by a cargo dock shaded by red awnings, while a large traditional sailboat emerges on the right. The scene then shifts as the waterway narrows, leading the boat toward a stone bridge arching over the channel. Finally, the camera follows the character underneath the bridge and between moored vessels, revealing the expansive city skyline in the distance.
